childhood.birthPlace: Shanjing Village, Changshu, Jiangsu Province, China
childhood.familyBackground: Born 1952 in Jiangsu Province. Family with modest background in textile region.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1952년 장쑤성에서 태어남. 섬유 지역의 소박한 배경의 가족.
childhood.education: Business and textile technology education in China
childhood.educationKo: 중국의 사업 및 섬유 기술 교육
childhood.earlyLife: Started in textile industry. Recognized opportunity in down apparel manufacturing.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 섬유 산업에서 시작. 다운 의류 제조의 기회를 인식.

careerTimeline.event: Founded Bosideng as down apparel manufacturer
Bosideng became world's largest down jacket manufacturer
careerTimeline.eventKo: Bosideng이 세계 최대 다운 자켓 제조사가 됨

careerTimeline.event: Bosideng operates globally with manufacturing and retail presence
careerTimeline.eventKo: Bosideng이 전 세계적 제조 및 소매 운영

personalTraits.knownFor: Building Bosideng into world's largest down apparel manufacturer, fashion industry innovation
personalTraits.knownForKo: Bosideng를 세계 최대 다운 의류 제조사로 구축, 패션 산업 혁신
